changelog: FIXED: pressing Back from the payment screen now properly exits the app (same as pressing Back on the Home screen). You're no longer trapped.
NEW: visible "Exit App" button at the bottom of the payment screen for users on TV/devices where the Back button is unreliable.

FIXED: HushTV no longer lets the system screensaver / DPMS kick in while the app is open. The screen stays on while you're using HushTV — releases automatically when you switch apps so your device still sleeps normally when HushTV is in the background. Applies to ALL flavors (Dev/Official/Canada) on ALL devices.
